wordplay_note: One of Runciter's inertials killed in the explosion
card_description: Al Hammond is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Technician at Runciter Associates who dies in the Luxembourg blast. Name note: One of Runciter's inertials killed in the explosion. Part of the ensemble whose deaths drive the half-life narrative. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Technician at Runciter Associates who dies in the Luxembourg blast
reference.significance: Part of the ensemble whose deaths drive the half-life narrative
